core.label: Odin Fundamentals
core.description: A systems language as an alternative to C.

topics.label: Installation
topics.description: Install Odin. Odin is designed as a better C for modern systems programming.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: Variable declarations, basic types, arrays, slices, maps, strings.

topics.label: Procedures
topics.description: proc keyword for functions. Named return values and multiple returns.

topics.label: Structs & Unions
topics.description: Struct types and tagged/untagged unions. Bit fields and struct packing.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if, switch, for (the only loop). switch is default-off (no fallthrough).

topics.label: Enums & Bit Sets
topics.description: Enumerated types and bit_set for flags. Clean flag handling.

topics.label: Memory Management
topics.description: Allocator-aware — context system passes allocators implicitly.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: or_return and or_else for Result-like error propagation. No exceptions.
